mnemonics.title: CUDA Data Flow: ACLCF
mnemonics.content: Remember the heterogeneous workflow: Allocate, Copy-in, Launch, Copy-out, Free -- 'Always Copy, Launch, Copy, Free'

mnemonics.title: PCIe Generations Bandwidth Doubling
mnemonics.content: Each PCIe generation doubles bandwidth: Gen 3 = 16 GB/s, Gen 4 = 32 GB/s, Gen 5 = 64 GB/s (x16 per direction). Think 'Power of 2 per generation, starting from 16'.
